moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates with the final match on Sunday, July 19, bringing the global football tournament to a close.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Sunday. The World Cup Final. Who are you backing to lift the trophy this year? Get your predictions in!

angles.name: Team Spirit
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The biggest game in football is just days away. What a tournament it's been.

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's final men's major of the year, tees off from July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Golf Excitement
angles.copy: It's Open Championship week! All eyes on Royal Birkdale as the world's best golfers battle for the Claret Jug. Who's your pick?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready! The Open Championship arrives in Southport this week, bringing world-class golf to our doorstep. Get ready for some incredible action.

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, continues daily on ITV2 and ITVX, with islanders navigating new relationships and drama in the Mallorcan villa.

angles.name: Daily Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! What's got you shouting at the TV tonight? Let us know!

angles.name: Villa Talk
angles.copy: Who's mugging who off in the Love Island villa? The recouplings are getting spicier by the day!

moments.title: UK Experiences Summer Warmth
moments.blurb: Parts of the UK, including London and Cardiff, are experiencing warm summer temperatures this week, with London forecast to reach 30°C and Cardiff around 28°C.

angles.name: Heatwave Buzz
angles.copy: Sunshine and 30°C in London today! How are you making the most of this glorious summer weather?

angles.name: Cardiff Warmth
angles.copy: Cardiff basking in summer sunshine with temperatures hitting 28°C! Perfect weather for enjoying everything Wales has to offer.

angles.name: General Summer
angles.copy: It's a warm one across the UK! Remember to stay hydrated and enjoy that summer sun.

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are starting or have just begun for many students across England, Wales, and Northern Ireland this week, with breaks typically running until late August or early September.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: That's it, school's out for summer! Wishing all students a fantastic break. What are your plans?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here for many! Time for family adventures, staycations, or just relaxing. What's on your list?

moments.title: Happy 39th Birthday, Dan Reynolds!
moments.blurb: Today, July 14, marks the 39th birthday of Dan Reynolds, the dynamic frontman of Grammy-winning rock band Imagine Dragons.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Tribute
angles.copy: Sending massive birthday wishes to Imagine Dragons' incredible frontman, Dan Reynolds, turning 39 today! What's your favourite Imagine Dragons track?

angles.name: Hits Celebration
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to Dan Reynolds of Imagine Dragons! From 'Radioactive' to 'Believer', he's given us so many anthems.

moments.title: Happy 40th Birthday, Dan Smith!
moments.blurb: Dan Smith, the lead singer and songwriter for the British indie pop band Bastille, celebrates his 40th birthday today, July 14.

angles.name: Bastille Shoutout
angles.copy: Cheers to 40 years! Happy Birthday to Bastille's very own Dan Smith! What's your favourite Bastille song?

angles.name: Indie Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the brilliant Dan Smith from Bastille! From 'Pompeii' to 'Happier', his vocals are iconic.

moments.title: Happy 66th Birthday, Kyle Gass!
moments.blurb: Kyle Gass, known as one half of the comedy rock duo Tenacious D with Jack Black, celebrates his 66th birthday today, July 14.

angles.name: Tenacious D Fun
angles.copy: The 'Kage' turns 66 today! Happy Birthday to the legendary Kyle Gass of Tenacious D! What's your favourite rock opera?

angles.name: Rock Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to Tenacious D's Kyle Gass! Bringing the comedy and the riffs since the 90s.

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday, Chris Cross!
moments.blurb: Chris Cross, the bassist for the iconic British New Wave band Ultravox, celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 14.

angles.name: Ultravox Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to Chris Cross, the bassist who gave us those unforgettable lines in Ultravox classics like 'Vienna'!

angles.name: New Wave Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Chris Cross of Ultravox on his 74th birthday today! A true pioneer of the New Wave sound.

moments.title: Happy 29th Birthday, Luke Hemmings!
moments.blurb: On Thursday, July 16, Luke Hemmings, the lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist for the Australian pop rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, turns 29.

angles.name: 5SOS Celebration
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Luke Hemmings from 5 Seconds of Summer turns 29 on Thursday! What's your favourite 5SOS hit?

angles.name: Pop Rock Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 29th Birthday to Luke Hemmings of 5 Seconds of Summer this Thursday! Still rocking the charts!

moments.title: Happy 74th Birthday, Stewart Copeland!
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer and founder of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Police Drummer
angles.copy: Don't stand so close to the drum kit! Happy 74th Birthday to the iconic Stewart Copeland of The Police on Thursday!

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: A true rhythm legend! Wishing Stewart Copeland of The Police a very Happy 74th Birthday this Thursday. What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana!
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, blues, and Latin influences, turns 79 on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana on Monday! His guitar riffs are pure magic.

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday this Monday! Still making music that moves your soul.

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday, Kim Carnes!
moments.blurb: Kim Carnes, the distinctive-voiced singer behind the 1981 smash hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: She's got Bette Davis Eyes! Happy 81st Birthday to the iconic Kim Carnes on Monday! What a voice!

angles.name: Classic Hits Vocalist
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to Kim Carnes this Monday! Still sounds amazing on the radio.

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday, Paul Cook!
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, the drummer for the seminal English punk rock band the Sex Pistols, turns 70 on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Punk Legend
angles.copy: Anarchy in the UK! Happy 70th Birthday to Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook on Monday! Still a punk icon.

angles.name: 70s Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a loud Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook of the Sex Pistols this Monday! The drumming force behind a revolution.

moments.title: Happy 60th Birthday, Stone Gossard!
moments.blurb: Stone Gossard, the co-founder and rhythm guitarist of the legendary grunge band Pearl Jam, celebrates his 60th birthday on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to Pearl Jam's incredible rhythm guitarist, Stone Gossard, on Monday! A true grunge pioneer.

angles.name: Pearl Jam Power
angles.copy: Celebrating Stone Gossard of Pearl Jam turning 60 this Monday! Still bringing the riffs that defined a generation.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley!
moments.blurb: Don Henley, the iconic drummer, singer, and songwriter for the Eagles, turns 79 on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley of the Eagles this Wednesday! Take it Easy, Don!

angles.name: Rock & Roll Hall of Famer
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley this Wednesday! An incredible voice and a drumming force behind some of rock's biggest hits.

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday, Selena Gomez!
moments.blurb: Actress and multi-platinum recording artist Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Pop Star Power
angles.copy: It's Selena Gomez's 34th Birthday this Wednesday! From pop anthems to acting, she does it all. What's your favourite Selena track?

angles.name: Birthday Wishes
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez this Wednesday! Still dominating the charts and screens.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, David Essex!
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex, known for hits like 'Gonna Make You A Star' and 'Hold Me Close', celebrates his 79th birthday on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: 70s Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the British icon, David Essex, this Thursday! 'Gonna Make You A Star' is still a classic!

angles.name: Timeless Performer
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 79th Birthday to David Essex this Thursday! A true legend of stage and song.

moments.title: Premier League Pre-Season Friendlies Kick Off
moments.blurb: Premier League clubs are beginning their pre-season campaigns this week, with various friendlies taking place in preparation for the 2026/27 season, including Aston Villa vs Walsall on July 21 and Liverpool vs Sunderland on July 25.

angles.name: Football's Back
angles.copy: The countdown to the new Premier League season is ON! Pre-season friendlies are starting – who are you most excited to see play?

angles.name: Team Specific
angles.copy: Aston Villa kick off their pre-season against Walsall on July 21st! Are you ready for the new season, Villans?

moments.title: New ITV Thriller 'The Dark' Airs
moments.blurb: ITV's gripping new drama 'The Dark' is airing this week, promising a tense and unpredictable story with plenty of twists.

angles.name: Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Need a new obsession? ITV's new thriller 'The Dark' is on this week and it's already got everyone talking! Are you watching?

angles.name: Mystery & Suspense
angles.copy: If you love a good mystery, 'The Dark' on ITV is your next must-watch. Twists, turns and brilliant performances!
